invalidation.condition: LME copper spot price closes below $11,000/tonne for 10 consecutive trading days.
invalidation.rationale: ~21% drawdown from the $13,965 reference. Would signal AI-capex reversal, China demand destruction, or major supply surprise. Structural thesis may still hold but near-term timing is broken.

invalidation.condition: Any 2 of the 3 largest hyperscalers (Microsoft, Google, Amazon) cut AI capex guidance by >25% vs prior quarter in the same earnings season.
LME copper warehouse inventory rises above 350,000 tonnes on a 4-week rolling average (supply normalization signal).
invalidation.review_note: Latest single reading 393,400t (2026-05-20) is above threshold but the condition specifies a 4-week rolling average not yet computed from one point. Not triggered on a single print — position held in full. Re-check the 4-week average next cycle; if confirmed >350kt, set triggered=true.

invalidation.condition: EUR/USD spot falls below 1.02 and stays below for 10 consecutive trading days (FX loss amplification on the USD-denominated vehicle).

assumptions.statement: Combined hyperscaler AI capex (Microsoft + Google + Amazon + Meta) stays above $60B/quarter guidance for each of the next 3 quarterly earnings cycles.
assumptions.measurability: Source: quarterly earnings transcripts and 10-Q/10-K. Falsified by: any single quarter where combined guidance falls below $60B AND the revision vs prior quarter exceeds -15%.

assumptions.statement: LME copper warehouse inventory stays below 200,000 tonnes on a 4-week rolling average throughout the horizon.
assumptions.measurability: Source: LME daily warehouse inventory report. Falsified by: 4-week rolling average exceeds 200,000 tonnes for 8 consecutive weeks.
assumptions.status_note: ⚠ BREACHING (2026-06-04): LME stock = 393,400t as of 2026-05-20 with positive inflows (+1,275t/day) — ~2x the 200,000t line and above the inv_03 350,000t threshold. Strict falsification needs >200kt for 8 consecutive weeks (week 1/8). The near-term supply-tightness leg is gone; structural DC-demand thesis intact.

assumptions.statement: COPX basket average AISC stays below $3.50/lb — proxied by FCX + SCCO combined quarterly reports.
assumptions.measurability: Source: FCX and SCCO quarterly earnings. Falsified by: both FCX AND SCCO report AISC > $3.50/lb in the same quarter.
assumptions.status_note: FCX Q1 2026: net cash cost $1.91/lb, est. AISC ~$2.30-2.50/lb. Grasberg Block Cave production cut (H2 2026 −9%) is COMPANY-SPECIFIC — check SCCO before triggering.

assumptions.statement: China Caixin Manufacturing PMI does not fall below 49.0 for 2 consecutive months.
assumptions.measurability: Source: Caixin PMI (monthly). Falsified by: 2 consecutive months below 49.0. Secondary escalation: PMI <49 for 1 month AND LME inventory >150,000t simultaneously.
assumptions.status_note: April 2026: 52.2 (5-year high). May 2026: 51.8. Both well above the 49.0 threshold. China manufacturing in expansion.

risk_discipline.note: Migrated from legacy thesis_20260603_copper_miners_datacenter_alpha (v4). Full position €1,000, bought on the dip 2026-06-04 — no rebalance (held in full). asm_02 (supply tightness) is weakening but that is a monitoring flag, not an exit. Re-rating mechanism: Goldman/JPM/BofA moving DC copper demand from scenario to base case (6–18 months after specialist reports). Horizon 8–52 weeks.

metadata.fill_note: €1,000 full amount, bought on the dip 2026-06-05 (Fri). Vehicle is WisdomTree Copper — Revolut labels it '4COP'; the yfinance-resolvable listing is 4COP.DE (Xetra, EUR). amount_eur=1000 is authoritative; actual fill price €60.62 → qty 16.50 (user-confirmed 2026-06-06; current ≈€55.49).
